breadth [bredθ]
bread [bred] - хлеб

examples.eng: I'm baking some bread.
This bread cuts easily.
She bakes bread every day.
A loaf of bread costs 70p.
He broke off a piece of bread.
Don't cut the bread so thin.
I sliced the bread thick.
Can you cut me a piece of bread, please?
Could you reach me some bread, please?

Serve the soup with crusty bread.
a basket of warm, crusty bread
They live on bread and potatoes.
examples.ru: Они живут на хлебе и картошке.

examples.eng: The bread crusted in the oven.
Man cannot live by bread alone.
Writing is my bread and butter.
a frugal meal of bread and cheese
examples.ru: скромная трапеза из хлеба и сыра

examples.eng: My bread is baked in my own oven.
examples.ru: Я пеку хлеб в своей собственной печи.

examples.eng: Half a loaf is better than no bread. посл.
He drives a bread truck.
This bread was baked fresh.
examples.ru: Хлеб был свежий, только из печи.

examples.eng: a piece of crispy fried bread

This bread's lovely and fresh.
Coat with bread crumbs and bake.
bread made from whole wheat grain
examples.ru: хлеб, испечённый из цельного пшеничного зерна

examples.eng: The moldy bread repulsed him.
examples.ru: Заплесневелый хлеб вызвал у него отвращение.

examples.eng: She was chomping on a bread roll.
This baker specializes in French bread
examples.ru: Этот пекарь, специализируется на французском хлебе.

examples.eng: Wheat is the stuff they use to make bread.
examples.ru: Пшеница — это тот материал, который используют, чтобы сделать хлеб.
